info.title: CV Parsing API
info.description: API for extracting structured data from CVs using NLP

get.description: Check the health status of the API and its components.

post.description: Register a new user account.
Authenticate and receive tokens. May require 2FA verification.
Refresh an access token using a refresh token.

get.description: Get the current user's profile.

put.description: Update the current user's profile (name, company).

delete.description: Permanently delete the current user's account and all associated data (GDPR).

put.description: Change the current user's password. Requires the current password.

post.description: Create a new API key. The full key is only shown once.

get.description: List all API keys for the current user.

schema.title: Response List Keys Api V1 Auth Api Keys Get
Response Revoke Key Api V1 Auth Api Keys  Key Id  Delete

put.description: Set or update webhook URL for parse notifications.

schema.title: Response Configure Webhook Api V1 Auth Webhook Put

post.description: Send a password reset email. Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.
Reset password using a valid reset token.
Verify a user's email address using a verification token.
Resend the email verification link.
Verify email using OTP code and return auth tokens.
Resend OTP verification code.

get.description: Return public OAuth client IDs for frontend redirect construction.

schema.title: Response Get Social Config Api V1 Auth Social Config Get

post.description: Authenticate via OAuth provider. Creates account if new user.

get.description: Check if 2FA is enabled for the current user.

schema.title: Response Get 2Fa Status Api V1 Auth 2Fa Status Get

post.description: Generate TOTP secret and provisioning URI for authenticator app.
Verify TOTP code and enable 2FA. Returns recovery codes.
Disable 2FA by verifying current TOTP code.
Verify 2FA code during login to receive full auth tokens.

put.description: Enable or disable email notifications for batch parse completions.
Configure confidence threshold for low-confidence parse alerts.

schema.title: Response Test Webhook Api V1 Auth Webhook Test Post

get.description: Return the Turnstile site key for the frontend.

schema.title: Response Get Captcha Config Api V1 Auth Captcha Config Get

Retry multiple failed jobs at once.

get.description: Download all your data including profile, jobs, and parsed results.
Download a branded PDF report for a completed parse job.
Get the status of a parsing job (cached for completed/failed jobs).

schema.title: Response Bulk Delete Jobs Api V1 Jobs Bulk Delete Post

get.description: Download parsed CV data as CSV or Excel.

400.description: Job not completed or invalid format

schema.title: Format

get.description: Return billing configuration for the frontend.

schema.title: Response Billing Config Api V1 Billing Config Get

get.description: Return active subscription plans for the pricing page.

schema.title: Response List Plans Api V1 Billing Plans Get

get.description: Get current subscription and usage info.

post.description:
Pull the current subscription from Stripe and sync to the DB.

Useful when webhooks aren't configured (e.g. local development).

schema.title: Response Sync Subscription Api V1 Billing Sync Post

post.description: Create a Stripe checkout session to subscribe to a plan.
Create a Stripe billing portal session for managing subscription.

get.description: List invoice history from Stripe.

post.description: Upgrade or downgrade subscription plan.

get.description: Get parse usage analytics for the current user.

schema.title: Response Get Usage Analytics Api V1 Analytics Usage Get

get.description: Get parse quality analytics for the current user.

schema.title: Response Get Parse Quality Api V1 Analytics Parse Quality Get

get.description: Get most common skills across the user's parsed candidates.

schema.title: Response Get Skill Frequency Api V1 Analytics Skill Frequency Get

get.description: Return the authenticated user's onboarding progress.

post.description: Create a new organization. The current user becomes the owner.

get.description: List all organizations the current user belongs to.

schema.title: Response List Orgs Api V1 Organizations Get

get.description: Get organization details. Must be a member.

put.description: Update organization details. Requires admin role or higher.

post.description: Invite a user to the organization. Requires admin role or higher.

get.description: List all members of an organization. Must be a member.

schema.title: Response List Org Members Api V1 Organizations  Org Id  Members Get

put.description: Update a member's role. Requires owner role.

delete.description: Remove a member from the organization. Requires admin role or higher.

schema.title: Response Remove Org Member Api V1 Organizations  Org Id  Members  User Id  Delete

post.description: Create a new office within an organization. Requires admin role. Custom plan only.

get.description: List all offices in an organization. Custom plan only.

schema.title: Response List Offices Api V1 Organizations  Org Id  Offices Get

put.description: Update an office. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Delete an office. Members/keys are unassigned (not deleted). Requires admin role.

schema.title: Response Delete Office Api V1 Organizations  Org Id  Offices  Office Id  Delete

put.description: Activate or suspend an office. Requires owner role.

schema.title: Response Update Office Status Api V1 Organizations  Org Id  Offices  Office Id  Status Put

put.description: Assign or unassign a member to/from an office. Requires admin role. Custom plan only.

schema.title: Response Assign Member Office Api V1 Organizations  Org Id  Members  User Id  Office Put

get.description: Get usage breakdown per office. Must be admin or owner. Custom plan only.

schema.title: Response Get Office Usage Api V1 Organizations  Org Id  Offices Usage Get

post.description: Convert an uploaded CV file to another format (PDF, DOCX, or JSON).
Convert multiple CV files to another format. Returns a ZIP archive.
Convert parsed CV JSON data to PDF or DOCX.
Convert an already-parsed job result to PDF or DOCX.

400.description: Job not completed or invalid request

get.description: List available templates and supported format conversions.
Download a sample DOCX template with all available placeholders pre-filled.

post.description: Upload a DOCX template with Jinja2 placeholders. Use {{ full_name }}, {{ email }}, {% for exp in work_experience %}, etc.

get.description: List all custom templates for the current user.
List all placeholders you can use inside a DOCX template.
Get a single template by ID.

put.description: Update template name, description, or default flag.

schema.title: Response Delete Template Api V1 Templates  Template Id  Delete

post.description: Fill a custom DOCX template with parsed CV data. Returns DOCX or PDF.
Apply a custom template to an already-parsed job result.
Stream a chat response from the AI assistant. Supports CV analysis, improvement suggestions, candidate matching, and general help.

get.description: Retrieve the current user's AI assistant conversation history.

schema.title: Response Get Conversation History Api V1 Assistant History Get

delete.description: Delete the current user's AI assistant conversation history.

schema.title: Response Delete Conversation History Api V1 Assistant History Delete

get.description: Get daily message and match usage counts for the current user.

schema.title: Response Get Assistant Usage Api V1 Assistant Usage Get

post.description: Compare 2-5 candidates side-by-side, optionally against a job description.

schema.title: Response Compare Candidates Endpoint Api V1 Candidates Compare Post

schema.title: Response Webhook Docs Api V1 Webhooks Docs Get

get.description: Get system-wide statistics with recent activity. Admin only.

schema.title: Response Get System Stats Api V1 Admin Stats Get

get.description: List all users with pagination. Admin only.
Get detailed user information. Admin only.

put.description: Override a user's plan and parse limit. Admin only.

schema.title: Response Override User Plan Api V1 Admin Users  User Id  Plan Put

put.description: Activate or deactivate a user. Admin only. Cannot deactivate admin users.

get.description: List all organizations. Admin only.

schema.title: Response List All Organizations Api V1 Admin Organizations Get

put.description: Override an organization's plan, parse limit, and default office price. Admin only.

schema.title: Response Override Org Plan Api V1 Admin Organizations  Org Id  Plan Put

get.description: List all jobs with filters. Admin only.

schema.title: Response List All Jobs Api V1 Admin Jobs Get

get.description: List all subscription plans ordered by sort_order. Admin only.

schema.title: Response List Subscription Plans Api V1 Admin Subscriptions Get

post.description: Create a new subscription plan. Admin only.

put.description: Update an existing subscription plan. Admin only.

schema.title: Response Update Subscription Plan Api V1 Admin Subscriptions  Plan Id  Put

delete.description: Soft-delete a subscription plan (sets is_active=False). Admin only.

schema.title: Response Delete Subscription Plan Api V1 Admin Subscriptions  Plan Id  Delete

post.description: Admin-only: sync a user's subscription from Stripe.

schema.title: Response Admin Sync User Subscription Api V1 Admin Users  User Id  Sync Subscription Post

get.description: Get revenue/billing data for the admin dashboard. Admin only.

schema.title: Response Get Admin Revenue Api V1 Admin Revenue Get

get.description: User growth, parse trends, and system-wide metrics. Admin only.

schema.title: Response Get Admin Analytics Api V1 Admin Analytics Get

400.description: Invalid file type or file too large

get.description: List audit events for the authenticated user.

If the user belongs to an organization, returns all org-wide events.
Otherwise returns only the user's own events.

schema.title: Response Get Activity Feed Api V1 Activity Get
